blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,258 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
